dimensions.name: Reasoning
dimensions.a: Claude reasons internally with no visibility
dimensions.b: Explicit thinking block shows step-by-step reasoning

dimensions.name: Best for
dimensions.a: Simple Q&A, creative writing, quick tasks
dimensions.b: Math, coding, analysis, multi-step logic, complex instructions

dimensions.name: Token cost
dimensions.b: Thinking tokens + output tokens both charged

dimensions.name: Latency
dimensions.b: Slower — Claude spends time thinking before responding
